name: Eure-et-Loir (France)
description: A blue chief bearing three gold fleurs-de-lis beneath a white label, over a white field charged with red chevrons.
history: The blue chief with fleurs-de-lis and label evokes the arms of the counts of Chartres, the historic capital of the area.

features.role: blue chief with three gold fleurs-de-lis and white label over white field with red chevrons
